# thoth_approval_decision (Resource)

Resolves a Thoth approval request (approve or deny).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `approval_id` (String) Approval ID to resolve.
- `decision` (String) Decision value: approve or deny.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource ID (approval ID).
- `reason` (String) Observed approval reason.
- `resolved_by` (String) Resolver identity returned by GovAPI.
- `status` (String) Observed approval status from approvals list endpoint.
- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant ID from provider configuration.
